positive: A minimalist, highly stylized depiction of a celestial forest meeting a crystalline beach at twilight. The composition must feature strong, defined silhouettes of stylized trees and flowing ocean waves against a dramatic gradient sky (deep indigo merging into soft lavender and burnt orange). Include abstract geometric elements, such as glowing constellations mapping across the horizon and floating crystalline jellyfish. The overall aesthetic should be deeply saturated, highly contrasted, and reminiscent of Japanese Ukiyo-e meets modern sci-fi vector art. Focus on symmetry and clean edges. Ideal for apparel printing, maximizing visual impact.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, logo, blurry, grain, noise, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, cluttered, dirty, muted colors, photo-realistic, detailed faces
